abort.already_configured: This CUKTECH AD1204U is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No CUKTECH AD1204U chargers were found.
abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a CUKTECH AD1204U.
abort.cloud_qr_start_failed: Could not reach the Xiaomi cloud to start QR login.

error.token_not_hex: Token must be a hex string.
error.token_wrong_length: Token must decode to 12 bytes (24 hex characters).
error.cloud_qr_failed: QR login failed or timed out. Please try again.
error.cloud_fetch_failed: Could not fetch the device list from the Xiaomi cloud.
error.cloud_device_not_found: This charger was not found in the selected Xiaomi region. Try a different region.

progress.waiting_for_scan:
Open the Mi Home app, tap the scan icon, and scan this QR code:

![QR code]({qr_url})

Waiting for scan…
progress.fetching_devices: Fetching device list from the Xiaomi cloud…

method.title: Choose how to provide the BLE token
method.description: The CUKTECH AD1204U needs a 12-byte BLE token before it can be read. You can fetch it automatically from your Xiaomi account, or paste one you already have.

cloud_region.title: Xiaomi account region
cloud_region.description: Pick the region your Mi Home account is registered in. If unsure, try **cn** first, then **de** or **sg**.

cloud_qr.title: Scan with the Mi Home app
cloud_qr.description:
Open the Mi Home app, tap the scan icon, and scan the QR code below.

![QR code]({qr_url})

cloud_error.title: Cloud login problem
cloud_error.description:
Something went wrong: **{reason}**.

Submit to go back and try again.

token.title: Enter BLE token for {name}
token.description: Paste the 24-character (12-byte) hex token for this device. You can fetch it from your Xiaomi account using the tools/ad1204u_fetch_token.py script shipped with this integration.

data.idle_release: Release BLE connection after idle (seconds, 0 = keep connected)
